title: Grit
subtitle: The Power of Passion and Perseverance
author: Angela Duckworth
excerpt: Why do some people achieve more than others of equal talent? Angela Duckworth spent a decade studying high achievers — from West Point cadets to National Spelling Bee champions — and found that the common factor was not IQ or talent but grit: passion and perseverance for long-term goals. Effort counts twice in the equation of achievement.
